sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, fixed_value FixedString(3), num_value Int32);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'abc', toFixedString('abc', 3), 99), (2, 'def', toFixedString('def', 3), 65), (3, 'ghi', toFixedString('ghi', 3), NULL);
SELECT id, bitShiftLeft(value, toUInt8(num_value)) AS shifted_value FROM (SELECT id, value, num_value FROM test_table WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, fixed_value, bitShiftLeft(bin(num_value), 2) AS shifted_bin FROM test_table WHERE toUInt8(num_value) - 10 < 0 GROUP BY id, fixed_value HAVING oneShifted = 0;
SELECT id, bitShiftLeft(num_value - 1, 1) AS shifted_minus_one FROM test_table WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL AND num_value - (bitShiftLeft(5, 1) - 3) > 0;

SELECT a.id, a.value, b.shifted_value FROM (SELECT id, value, bitShiftLeft(value, 2) AS shifted_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS a JOIN (SELECT id, bitShiftLeft(fixed_value, 4) AS shifted_fixed FROM test_table) AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, bitShiftLeft(num_value, getRandom(1, 5)) AS randomized_shifted FROM test_table WHERE fixed_value = toFixedString('abc', 3) OR value = 'ghi' HAVING randomized_shifted - 32 > 0;

SELECT id, num_value, bitShiftLeft(CAST(num_value AS String), 3) AS shifted_string_value FROM test_table WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT id, NULL, bitShiftLeft(CAST(NULL AS Int32), 3) FROM test_table WHERE fixed_value IS NOT NULL;
